name_cn:
!!️
Nomad Clutch Lunch Box Series
Upgraded lunch box bag, who understands the joy of having a shoulder strap included
The added adjustable long strap greatly improves practicality
Simple and soft silhouette, very lightweight for personal use
The hardware letter logo on the strap is another highlight
This vintage print lunch box really understands daily life
Capacity fits everything needed for commuting
Classic Oblique denim gets better with age
Pairs perfectly with T-shirts and knitwear for a relaxed, premium look
Definitely a practical bag you can carry for years
size:22*13*9.5cm
